EvaluationAutosave.title: EvaluationAutosave
EvaluationAutosave.description: Stores periodic auto-saved progress of an evaluation form

userId.description: The ID of the user who owns this draft

editId.description: The evaluation ID being edited, or 'new'

peerFeedbacks.description: The current list of peer feedbacks

lastSavedAt.description: The timestamp when this draft was last saved

evaluation_autosaves/{draftId}.description: Collection of evaluation form auto-saved drafts
